ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Inprogress, Pending, Completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead_id") REFERENCES project_leads ("project_lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_leads" (
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project lead */,
  "project_lead_name" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project lead */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the project lead (e.g., project_manager, team_lead) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project lead was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project lead's information was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the project lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the project lead belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., developer, designer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team member's information was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the team member belongs */,
  "leave_balance" INTEGER /* Leave balance of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member being assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Active, Completed, Terminated) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being logged */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member logging progress */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the task */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the progress */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the team member to whom the task is assigned */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member to whom the notification is sent */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_leads_assignments" (
  "lead_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assigned */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead being assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the project lead was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead assignment (e.g., Active, Terminated) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lead assignment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_leads_assignments_project_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead_id") REFERENCES project_leads ("project_lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_leads_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (team member or project lead) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
